_note: These are STATIC DETECTION PATTERNS for a security scanner. They SEARCH for dangerous code. They do not execute it.

unsafe_execution.message: Use of os.system() can be dangerous; prefer subprocess.run().
Use of eval() can execute arbitrary code.
Use of exec() can execute arbitrary code.
subprocess with shell=True is vulnerable to shell injection.

network.message: POST request to suspicious file extension domain.
Raw urlopen calls can be used for data exfiltration.

Potential prompt injection: asking to ignore above content.
Document contains potential prompt injection language.
